title: Robust High Back Multi-Tilter Chair 500lb Weight Capacity GLB74475
brand_hint: Global Furniture Group (look for GLB model code)

specs.dimensions: 29"W x 27.5"D x 50.5"H overall; seat width 25", seat depth 20", seat height 16.5"–20.5"; back height 30" from seat; base diameter 32"
specs.materials: Ultracell high-density high-resilient foam seat and back; abrasion-resistant polyester back fabric; two-tone upholstery (outer border/trim always in Silhouette fabric SL20 Asphalt black); solid steel vinyl-dipped loop-style arms; 6-prong oval tubular steel base (black); 3" dual-wheel black/grey casters rated 225 lbs each
finishes_available: Volcanic Ash (main fabric — two-tone with black SL20 Asphalt trim border)
Black (SL20 Asphalt — outer trim, always standard)
Multiple Grade 1/Grade 2/Grade 4 fabric options (e.g., Dobby Pewter DB34, Renewal RN33)
key_features: 500 lb active weight capacity — rated for big & tall and multi-shift users
Multi-tilter mechanism: forward and rearward seat-tilt with infinite lock
Tilt-tension adjustment reachable from seated position
Width-adjustable solid steel vinyl-dipped loop arms (+2" each side, 25"–27" spread)
No armless option — arms are standard on all models
6-prong oval tubular steel base 32" diameter (black only) for extra stability
3" large-diameter casters each rated 225 lbs; suitable for hard floors or carpet
Two-tone fabric design: seat/back centre in choice fabric; outer border always in black SL20 Asphalt
Ultracell high-density high-resilient foam on seat and back
Optional memory foam seat upgrade available
Optional ballistic nylon outer back (black only)
Tested to exceed BIFMA X5.11 large-occupant seating standard
specs.warranty: Limited Lifetime Warranty — lifetime of product for individual end-user; 25 years for corporate end-user (some time limits apply to specific parts/components)
specs.notes: GLB74475 is BBI's SKU for the Global Robust 2526 High Back Heavy Duty Multi-Tilter with headrest. The exact GLB74475 code does not appear on the manufacturer's website directly; it is a dealer SKU. Dimensions confirmed via multiple authorized dealers. The Robust line includes model 2526 (high back with headrest, overall H 50.5") and 2527 (medium back, overall H 42.5"). BBI lists the finish as Volcanic Ash for the main fabric section, with the outer border always in black SL20 Asphalt (two-tone standard). No GREENGUARD or LEVEL certification specifically confirmed for Robust — those apply to other Global lines (Truform, Factor). Weight not found; typically 60–80 lbs estimated for this heavy-duty class but not confirmed.
